title: Spectrum Storage
description: Adds storage related items to spectrum progression
body:
This adds a tool container, bottomless bottle, and bottomless shelf to Spectrum progression.

A tool container can contain all the extra tools you have in a single item slot.

A bottomless bottle can contain a large amount of fluid inside a single item slot.

A bottomless shelf can hold 6 bottomless bundles and bottles inside a single block, and remember the items and fluids they held, allowing for easy filtering.

NOTE: This project requires [Krysztal's Language Scala](https://modrinth.com/mod/krysztal-language-scala), and specifically with a scala version of at least 3.3.6, which is NOT the latest version on the download page! Be sure to download the correct version.
